supply_chain.dependencies: Sole-source and limited-source suppliers for key components such as ASICs and lithium-ion batteries. LFP battery cells for storage products are supplied solely via two suppliers in China. Dependence on small number of contract manufacturers (Flex, Salcomp, Sunwoda) for assembly and testing.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions including raw materials shortages, semiconductor and integrated circuit constraints, logistics issues, labor shortages. Concentration risk with contract manufacturers. Counterfeit parts risk. Climate-related physical risks to manufacturing facilities. Geopolitical tensions affecting supply from China. Tariffs on components imported to the United States.

regulatory_risks: Reduction, elimination or expiration of government subsidies and economic incentives for solar energy (ITC, AMPTC, NEM policies)
Changes to Net Energy Metering policies (NEM 3.0 in California significantly reduced export compensation)
Changes to Virtual NEM and NEM Aggregation programs in California
Potential modifications or elimination of IRA tax credits and incentives through future legislative or executive actions
Uncertainty regarding domestic content bonus tax credit qualification under IRA
Complex and evolving trade and customs laws, tariffs, and import/export regulations
U.S.-China trade tensions and existing/potential tariffs on products manufactured in China
Section 301 tariffs (10% increased to 25% in 2019) on solar products manufactured in China
Potential additional tariffs or trade restrictions
Compliance with anti-bribery laws (FCPA, U.K. Bribery Act, EU and Brazil anti-bribery laws)
Environmental laws including EU WEEE and RoHS regulations
Conflict minerals disclosure requirements
Data privacy and security regulations (EU GDPR, evolving U.S. state laws)
ESG-related disclosure requirements and stakeholder expectations
Antitrust and competition laws in multiple jurisdictions
Changes to utility pricing structures and interconnection requirements
State and local regulations on solar power system installations
Potential taxes levied on renewable energy in certain countries
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) under IRA
OECD Pillar Two Global Minimum Tax rules (15% minimum tax for multinationals)
Uncertainty in interpretation and implementation of IRA provisions
Potential changes to tax laws affecting transfer pricing and foreign operations

sanction_risks: Escalating U.S.-China trade tensions and tariffs
Potential impact of ongoing military conflicts in Ukraine and Gaza Strip on global operations
Uncertainty regarding China-Taiwan relations and potential impact on supply chain
Risk of additional sanctions or trade restrictions affecting component sourcing from China
Compliance risks with sanctions orders in various jurisdictions
